open_uncertainties: Whether the paper has only one main proposed patch or also a later array/beam-shaping variant
Whether the fabricated/measured results correspond to the same proposed antenna or a separate implementation
Whether the final selected geometry differs from the initial proposed dimensions
How much of the paper is simulation-only versus experimentally validated

search_queries.why: The paper repeatedly labels the design as proposed, so this is the best entry point for the main candidate design.
Table 1 is explicitly named as the dimensions of the proposed antenna and may confirm the selected geometry.
The inset feed is a key design choice mentioned in the abstract and figure captions, and may resolve the feed implementation.
The paper map includes fabricated signals and a measurement figure, so this may identify the built version versus only the simulated proposal.
The map suggests an array/beam-shaping discussion later in the paper, which may indicate a secondary variant or extension beyond the main patch.
